name: connector
description: Centralized CLI tool to generate and maintain Ballerina connector assets from OpenAPI specifications or Java SDKs.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Required for AI-powered SDK workflow stages and OpenAPI AI-assisted generation, sanitization, documentation, and repair.

openapi.description: Generate and maintain Ballerina connectors from OpenAPI specifications.

pipeline.description: Run the complete OpenAPI connector automation pipeline.

arguments.name: openapi_spec
arguments.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification file.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Output directory for the generated connector workspace.

regenerate.description: Reapply recorded sanitations and recover tests/examples for an updated spec.

remote-methods.description: Generate client APIs as remote methods.

resource-methods.description: Generate client APIs as resource methods.

sanitize.description: Sanitize an OpenAPI specification with AI enhancements.

arguments.name: input_spec
arguments.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification file.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Directory for processed files.

generate-client.description: Generate a Ballerina client from an OpenAPI specification.

arguments.name: openapi_spec
arguments.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification file.

arguments.name: output_directory
arguments.description: Directory where the generated client will be stored.

remote-methods.description: Generate client APIs as remote methods.

resource-methods.description: Generate client APIs as resource methods.

license.description: License file path for generated copyright headers.

fix-code.description: Fix Ballerina compilation errors in an OpenAPI-generated connector.

arguments.name: connector_path
arguments.description: Path to the generated Ballerina connector directory.

generate-tests.description: Generate mock-server and live tests for an OpenAPI-generated connector.

arguments.name: connector_path
arguments.description: Path to the connector workspace.

arguments.name: spec_path
arguments.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification.

generate-examples.description: Generate example code for an OpenAPI-generated connector.

arguments.name: connector_path
arguments.description: Path to the connector workspace.

regenerate.description: Try fixing existing examples first, then fall back to fresh generation.

generate-docs.description: Generate README documentation for an OpenAPI-generated connector.

arguments.name: doc_command
arguments.description: Documentation generation mode.

arguments.name: connector_path
arguments.description: Path to the connector workspace.

generate-all.description: Shortcut for OpenAPI documentation generation using generate-all.

arguments.name: connector_path
arguments.description: Path to the connector workspace.

sdk.description: Generate and maintain Ballerina connectors from Java SDKs.

analyze.description: Analyze a Java SDK JAR or Maven coordinate and write metadata.

arguments.name: sdk_ref
arguments.description: Dataset key resolved from test-jars, or Maven coordinate such as group:artifact:version.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory for generated SDK workflow artifacts.

sources.description: Path to a sources JAR or extracted source directory.

include-packages.description: Restrict analysis to specific Java packages.

methods-to-list.description: Maximum number of SDK methods to list.

pipeline.description: Run the complete Java SDK to Ballerina connector pipeline.

arguments.name: dataset_key
arguments.description: Dataset key resolved from test-jars/<dataset-key>.jar and test-jars/<dataset-key>-javadoc.jar.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory for generated connector artifacts.

fix-code.description: Run full code fixing phase. Enabled by default.

fix-report-only.description: Run fixer diagnostics without applying all fixes.

generate.description: Generate SDK API specification and IR from analyzer metadata.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing analyzer metadata.

connector.description: Generate Ballerina connector artifacts from SDK metadata, IR, and API spec.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing SDK workflow artifacts.

fix-code.description: Fix generated SDK connector Java native and Ballerina compilation errors.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing generated SDK connector artifacts.

fix-report-only.description: Run SDK connector fixer diagnostics without applying all fixes.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing generated SDK connector artifacts.

generate-tests.description: Generate live integration tests for an SDK-generated connector.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing generated SDK connector artifacts.

generate-examples.description: Generate examples for an SDK-generated connector.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing generated SDK connector artifacts.

generate-docs.description: Generate all documentation for an SDK-generated connector.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing generated SDK connector artifacts.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Root directory containing generated SDK connector artifacts.
